tagline: The blessed life of Rasoolullah ﷺ

lessons.title: The Birth of Rasoolullah ﷺ
lessons.summary: Rasoolullah ﷺ was born in the “Year of the Elephants”. In that year, Abrahaa-bin-Saba, the governor of Yemen, came with an army of “The Men of Elephants” to destroy the Kaabah. Allah sent flights of birds which rained down stones and destroyed the army — mentioned in Surah Feel (The Elephants). His father Abdullah had passed away at Yathrib (Madeenah) before his birth.

keyTerms.meaning: The year Rasoolullah ﷺ was born
The governor of Yemen who tried to destroy the Kaabah
The blessed spring near the hills of Safa and Marwah
The chapter of the Qur'an about the Elephants

points: Rasoolullah ﷺ was born in the Year of the Elephants.
Abrahaa came with an army of elephants to destroy the Kaabah; Allah sent birds that rained stones and destroyed them (Surah Feel).
Sayyidah Haajirah رضي الله عنه, mother of Sayyidina Ismaaeel عليه السلام, found Zam Zam between the hills of Safa and Marwah and built walls around it.
His father Abdullah passed away at Yathrib (Madeenah) before his birth.

questions.prompt: In which year was Rasoolullah ﷺ born?
questions.explanation: He ﷺ was born in the Year of the Elephants — when Abrahaa's army was destroyed.

questions.prompt: Who came with an army of elephants to destroy the Kaabah?
questions.explanation: Abrahaa-bin-Saba, the governor of Yemen, tried to destroy the Kaabah.

questions.prompt: How did Allah destroy Abrahaa's army?
options: He sent flights of birds which rained down stones
questions.correctAnswer: He sent flights of birds which rained down stones
questions.explanation: Allah sent birds that pelted the army with stones — told in Surah Feel.

questions.prompt: Which two hills are close to the well of Zam Zam?
questions.explanation: Safa and Marwah are the two hills, now part of the noble sanctuary.

questions.prompt: The Qur'an mentions the elephants in Surah ______.
questions.explanation: Surah Feel (The Elephants) tells of Abrahaa's army.

questions.prompt: Where did Abdullah, the father of Rasoolullah ﷺ, pass away?
questions.explanation: He passed away at Yathrib, which is Madeenah.

flashcards.front: In which year was Rasoolullah ﷺ born?
Who tried to destroy the Kaabah with elephants?
How did Allah save the Kaabah?
flashcards.back: He sent birds that rained stones on the army (Surah Feel).

flashcards.front: Which two hills are near Zam Zam?
What happened to Abdullah, father of Rasoolullah ﷺ?
flashcards.back: He passed away at Yathrib (Madeenah) before his son's birth.

flashcards.front: Which Surah tells about the elephants?
